included.text: Daily breakfast and regional dinner meals
Local experienced driver and sightseeing guide
Private air-conditioned transfers for the entire route

itinerary.title: Arrive in Bangalore & Palace Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Arrive in Bangalore. Visit the grand Bangalore Palace, explore Vidhana Soudha's external architecture, and stroll through Lalbagh Botanical Gardens.

itinerary.title: Mysore Palace & Chamundi Hills
itinerary.description: Drive to Mysore. Visit Chamundi Hills for a city panoramic view, tour the spectacular Mysore Palace, and enjoy the evening at Brindavan Gardens.

itinerary.title: Hogenakkal Coracle Boat Ride & Departure
itinerary.description: Drive to Hogenakkal Falls. Take a thrilling coracle boat ride through the deep gorge and misty Kaveri River cascades before heading for departure.

title: Mysore, Bangalore & Hogenakkal: Royal Cities & Waterfalls
description: Tour the cosmopolitan capital Bangalore, the royal heritage city Mysore, and the roaring Hogenakkal waterfalls. See palaces, technological hubs, botanical gardens, and experience a traditional coracle boat ride.
highlights: Visit Bangalore Palace and the serene Lalbagh Botanical Gardens
Tour the majestic Mysore Palace and Chamundi Hills
Take a thrilling coracle boat ride at Hogenakkal Falls
